title: heptapleurum oblongum
intro: Heptapleurum oblongum, also known as the Himalayan maidenhair fern, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan and Southeast Asian regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Heptapleurum oblongum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Heptapleurum oblongum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for its medicinal uses.
